'''Four-Onebee''' was the [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] that [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Ixsthmus]] used aboard the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] ''[[Long Shot]]''.

It performed its duties happily and was always eager to please. Its programming was also in very good condition. Its only complaint was that when it was not needed by the crew, it would usually be turned off and stored in a closet.
